title: Geometry & Topology Deep: Ricci Flow, Exotic Spheres & Cobordism

key_theorem.statement: Ricci flow ∂g/∂t = -2Ric is EML-2 (Ricci tensor = second derivative of metric). Perelman's entropy functional W is EML-3 (involves exp(-f)/τ^{n/2}). Neck pinch singularity (curvature blowup) is EML-∞. The number of exotic 7-spheres (28) is EML-0 (integer). Bernoulli numbers B_k (appearing in exotic sphere count formula) are EML-2 (rational). Atiyah-Singer index: integer (EML-0) = integral of EML-3 form. Topology collapses EML-3 integrals to EML-0 integers — the deepest depth reduction in geometry.

perelman_entropy.reason: (4πτ)^{-n/2}·e^{-f}: EML-1 (exponential decay) × EML-2 (power) = EML-2; with ∇f terms → EML-3
perelman_entropy.key_property: W is monotone non-decreasing under Ricci flow: dW/dt ≥ 0
perelman_entropy.reason_mono: dW/dt = ∫2τ|R_{ij}+∇_i∇_jf - g_{ij}/2τ|² ≥ 0: EML-2 integrand squared → EML-2 ≥ 0

poincare_conjecture.statement: Every simply-connected closed 3-manifold is homeomorphic to S³
poincare_conjecture.proof: Perelman (2002-2003) via Ricci flow with surgery
poincare_conjecture.surgery: Neck pinch (EML-∞) removed by EML-0 surgery (topological cut-and-paste)

exotic_spheres.kervaire_milnor: Θ_n via surgery: Bernoulli numbers (EML-2) + homotopy groups (EML-0)

generating_function.reason: e^t in denominator: EML-1 (exp appears once)

cobordism.cobordism_ring: Ω*_SO ⊗ ℚ = ℚ[CP², CP⁴, CP⁶,...] — polynomial ring over ℚ: EML-0

chern_character.reason: ch(E) = exp(c₁) in K-theory: EML-3 (exp of cohomology class)

atiyah_singer.reason: Index = integer (EML-0); integrand ch·Â = EML-3 (Chern char) × EML-2 (Â) = EML-3
atiyah_singer.significance: EML-0 integer (index) arises as integral of EML-3 form — topology collapses EML-3 to EML-0

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Exotic sphere count (28, 992, 16256); Betti numbers; cobordism ring generators; Euler characteristic
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Perelman entropy decay e^{-f}; heat-type solution of Ricci flow; Bernoulli generating function
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Ricci tensor; curvature scaling; Â genus; Bernoulli numbers; scalar curvature R(t)=R₀/(1-ct)
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Chern character ch(E) = exp(c₁) in K-theory; Perelman W functional; Atiyah-Singer integrand
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Ricci flow neck pinch (curvature → ∞); exotic sphere singularities; Milnor fibration

rabbit_hole_log: Index theorem as EML depth collapse: ∫_M ch(E)·Â(M) ∈ ℤ. The integrand is EML-3; the result is EML-0. This is the most dramatic EML depth reduction in mathematics: integration collapses EML-3 to EML-0. The integral 'knows' only the topology.

Ricci flow surgery: at neck pinch (EML-∞), Perelman cuts the manifold and pastes in a round cap (EML-0 topological operation). After surgery, flow continues as EML-2. The theorem is: you can tame EML-∞ singularities with EML-0 surgery.

Exotic spheres and EML-0: Θ_7=28, Θ_11=992, Θ_15=16256. These are integers (EML-0) but they come from the Bernoulli numbers (EML-2) via the formula |B_{2k}|·... The exotic sphere count encodes EML-2 arithmetic in EML-0 integers.

connections.to_session_86: Session 86: GR singularities = EML-∞ (Penrose). Session 99: Ricci flow neck pinch = EML-∞ — same class, different geometry
connections.to_session_58: Chern numbers = EML-0 (S58). Session 99: Atiyah-Singer = EML-3 → EML-0 collapse via integration
